title: Assistant Store Manager - Borosil - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Borosil - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Borosil are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!
